name: TooltipGroup
description: Chart tooltip surface showing a date header, data series rows, and an optional total with a configurable pointer arrow.

props.name: date
props.description: Optional date/header text shown above the tooltip values.

props.name: items
props.description: Tooltip value rows rendered in order.

props.name: total
props.description: Optional total row shown below a divider.

props.name: showPointer
props.description: Whether to show the decorative pointer.

props.name: pointerPlacement
props.description: Placement of the decorative pointer relative to the tooltip body.

states.rationale: Passive tooltip surface. pointer-events: none on root. No interactive states.

propertyMapping.note: Boolean toggle for date visibility. In code, presence of date string controls visibility.
Figma exposes pointer visibility only. Code also exposes pointerPlacement for chart wrappers that place a tooltip above a hovered mark.
Boolean toggle for total row. In code, total is a TooltipGroupItem object or null.
Figma slot for tooltip items. In code, items array.

useWhen: Displaying data values on chart hover
Showing multi-series data at a single point in time
doNotUseFor: General UI tooltips — use the DLS Tooltip component
